ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (AMENDED): THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED. [X] PAYMENTS OF $250.00 ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH STARTING 7-1-2017 UNTIL 11-1-2019. IF ANY PAYMENT IS NOT MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAY NOTIFY THE COURT TO CANCEL THE PAYMENT PLAN AND THE ENTIRE UNPAID BALANCE WILL BECOME DUE AND COLLECTIBLE.

ORDER (SC-222) ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS: [X] THE COURT WILL MAKE AN ORDER ON THIS REQUEST AFTER A HEARING WHICH WILL TAKE PLACE ON: JUNE 19, 2017 AT 11:00 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 506.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2017 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO OCT-19-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR DIRECTLY $250 PER MONTH STARTING JULY 1, 2017 AND $250 ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH UNTIL AUGUST 2019 WITH A FINAL PAYMENT OF $101.00. JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO FILL OUT AND SEND STATEMENT OF ASSETS TO CREDITOR. BOTH PARTIES APPEARED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $6,000.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $198.38 ACCRUED INTEREST, $311.25 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, NATALIE
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, PER REQUEST OF THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR.
